about_feature_description_any_device: Works with streaming services, and digital purchases. iOS, Android, Apple TV, Android TV, and more.
about_feature_description_calendar: Follow your shows and get notified when new episodes air. Your personal TV calendar keeps you on top of everything.
about_feature_description_community: Follow friends, see what the team is watching, and discover shared favourites. Watching together is better.
about_feature_description_discover: Get personalised recommendations based on your taste. Explore trending titles and curated lists from the Trakt community.
about_feature_description_rate_review: Share your opinions with ratings and comments. See how your taste compares to millions of other watchers.
about_feature_description_scrobble: Automatically scrobble what you watch across hundreds of apps and media servers. Never lose track of your progress.
button_label_clean_up_episodes: Remove duplicate episode plays from your history.
button_label_clean_up_movies: Remove duplicate movie plays from your history.
button_label_download_unresolved: Download a CSV file listing the items that were skipped during the import.
button_label_import_more: Reset and start a new import.
button_label_import_selected: Import the movie matches you picked above.
button_label_join_trakt: Join trakt.tv to keep track of what you're watching
button_label_raw_export: Export a ZIP file containing your raw data.
button_label_remove_from_history: Remove this play of "{title}" from your Watched list
button_label_set_cover_image: Set the image of "{title}" as your cover image.
button_label_sort_remaining: Sort by remaining episodes or movies
button_label_start_import: Start importing your data into Trakt.
button_label_tv_time_faq: Open the TV Time import FAQ
button_label_view_all_start_watching: View all Watchlist items available to watch
button_label_watch_until_here_anchor_end: Treat the picked date as the end of the binge
button_label_watch_until_here_anchor_sta: Treat the picked date as the start of the binge
confirmation_challenge_delete_account: To confirm, type your username {username} below.
confirmation_message_delete_api_app: This permanently deletes {name} and revokes every token issued for it. This cannot be undone.
confirmation_message_disconnect_plex: This will stop syncing your Plex library. You can reconnect at any time.
confirmation_message_revoke_app: This will revoke {name}'s access to your Trakt account. You can reconnect it at any time.
confirmation_message_rewatching_prompt: Starting a rewatching session will update your Continue Watching.
confirmation_message_undo_sync: This will reverse every item this sync imported into your history, ratings, watchlist, and library.
confirmation_message_unlink_streaming: This will stop syncing your watched history and ratings from {service}. You can reconnect at any time.
date_time_label_watch_until_here: Pick the date and time used to anchor the binge
date_time_label_watched: Pick a date and time when you watched "{title}"
description_account_details: Change your photo, name and other details.
description_api_applications: OAuth applications you've registered as a developer.
description_appearance: Change your theme and language settings.
description_apps_settings: Manage your connected apps and API applications.
description_behavior: Manage your spoiler tolerance and rewatching habits.
description_blocked_users: People you've blocked can't follow you or see your activity.
description_clear_data: Permanently delete data from your Trakt account.
description_connected_apps: Third-party apps you've authorised to access your Trakt account.
description_create_api_application: Register a new OAuth application to access the Trakt API.
description_data_syncs: Recent data syncs from your connected streaming services.
description_delete_account: Your personal information will be removed and your statistical data will be anonymised.
description_edit_api_application: Update your OAuth application's details, redirect URIs and permissions.
description_export: Get an export of your user data in a single ZIP file. This process may take a while.
description_genres: Add or remove your {limit} favourite genres.
description_history_analysis: Find duplicate plays in your watch history and keep only the most recent watch of each item.
description_import: Import your data from other services directly in your browser.
description_paused_items: These items were not watched at least 80%.
description_plex_home_users: Your own plays always sync. Add other Plex Home usernames to sync theirs too.
description_plex_manual_sync: Trigger an immediate sync of your Plex watch history to Trakt.
description_plex_scrobbler_settings: These settings control what gets scrobbled to Trakt in real time.
description_plex_servers: Choose the Plex server to sync with Trakt.
description_plex_sync: Connect your Plex account to sync watch history, ratings, and collections with Trakt.
description_plex_sync_settings: These settings control which data types sync to Trakt.
description_plex_webhook: Automatically scrobble what you're watching, rating, and adding to your library in real time.
description_preview_features: Try upcoming features before they're broadly available. Preview Features may change as we refine them.
description_skipped_items: Anything in red caused the item to be skipped.
description_streaming_services: Your favourites make it easier to find content on the services you watch most.
description_streaming_sync: Automatically sync your watched history and ratings.
description_streaming_vip_services: Upgrade to connect and sync these streaming services.
dialog_prompt_media_share_image_format: Choose an image format to share.
dialog_prompt_younify_data_sync: Would you like to import your existing data to your Trakt account, or only sync new data from now on?
error_text_404: (Don't worry, it happens! Even the Force is sometimes out of alignment.)
error_text_delete_account: Something went wrong deleting your account. Please try again.
error_text_email: Email update failed. Make sure it's a valid address.
error_text_lists_limit: You've reached your limit for personal lists. Upgrade to VIP for unlimited lists!
error_text_locked_account_collection_lim: This user account has been locked because the collection has exceeded the limit. Please contact support to resolve this issue.
error_text_locked_account_guide: Please visit the advanced settings to run a history analysis and unlock your account.
error_text_locked_account_persists: If the issue persists, please contact support to resolve this issue.
error_text_payment_other: There was an error while processing your payment. Please try again or contact support if needed.
error_text_payment_unavailable: There was an error while processing your payment. It looks like you're unable to make a payment at this time. Please try again.
error_text_report_rate_limited: Too many reports in a short period. Please try again later.
error_text_report_unknown: Something went wrong while submitting this report. If this keeps happening, please submit a new issue.
error_text_service_unavailable: The connection is... absent. Like a forgotten memory.
error_text_sync_load_failed: We couldn't load this right now. Please try again.
error_text_unexpected_error: Uh oh... this wasn't planned. If this keeps happening, please submit a new issue.
error_text_unexpected_error_include_deta: Please include these details when reporting the issue:
error_text_unexpected_error_short: Uh oh... this wasn't planned. If this keeps happening, please contact Trakt support.
error_text_unexpected_notes_error: Something went wrong while posting your note. If this keeps happening, please submit a new issue.
error_text_username: Username update failed. It's either taken or contains invalid characters.
header_device_auth_qr_instruction: Scan the QR code, or sign in at:
header_device_auth_try_again: The activation was denied, expired, or something unforeseeable happened. Please try again.
header_notifications_rationale: Enable notifications to stay on top of your media releases and current watching activity.
hint_app_description: This shows up in the Connected Apps section when a user grants access to your app.
hint_app_origins: One origin per line. No wildcards or paths.
hint_app_redirect_uris: One URI per line. No query strings, just the full URI path. Use urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob for device authentication.
import_complete_ambiguous: {count} movies matched more than one title. Pick the right ones and import them:
import_complete_unresolved: {count} movies couldn't be matched and were skipped:
import_drop_csv: Drop CSV files here or click to upload.
import_drop_json: Drop a JSON file here or click to upload.
import_drop_zip: Drop a ZIP file here or click to upload.
import_guide_csv_description: Upload your CSV file and let Trakt organise your movie and TV show universe. Make sure your CSV is properly formatted with the fields described in the guidelines.
import_guide_csv_intro: Your CSV file should contain a header row followed by one row per item to import.
import_guide_csv_title: Data in a grid? We've got you covered!
import_guide_field_id_description: The ID can be a Trakt ID, IMDb ID, or TMDB ID. For TV shows it can also be a TVDB ID.
import_guide_field_rated_at_description: Date and time the item was rated. ISO 8601 format.
import_guide_field_rated_at_note: Only parsed if a rating is also present.
import_guide_field_rating_description: Rating for the item. Must be a value from 1 to 10.
import_guide_field_type_description: Specifies what the ID refers to. Optional but recommended.
import_guide_field_watched_at_descriptio: Date and time the item was watched. ISO 8601 format.
import_guide_field_watched_at_note: Can be "unknown" to import with an unknown watch date. Omit if only adding to watchlist.
import_guide_field_watchlisted_at_descri: Date and time the item was added to your watchlist. ISO 8601 format.
import_guide_field_watchlisted_at_note: Omit if only marking as watched.
import_guide_imdb_description: Download your IMDb watchlist as a .csv and import it here in seconds. It's as easy as 1, 2, Trakt! Here's how to get your .csv file:
import_guide_imdb_step_1: Go to IMDb and log in
import_guide_imdb_title: IMDb on Trakt? Lights, camera, action! ✨
import_guide_json_description: Trakt welcomes your structured data with open arms. Upload your JSON file, making sure it follows our guidelines for a smooth and successful import.
import_guide_json_intro: Your JSON file should contain an array of objects. Each object represents an item to import.
import_guide_letterboxd_description: It's just a hop, skip, and a .zip away! Download your Letterboxd data and import it here. Here's the lowdown on getting that .zip:
import_guide_letterboxd_step_1: Go to Letterboxd and log in
import_guide_letterboxd_step_3: Download your Letterboxd export data in a zip file and upload it here
import_guide_letterboxd_title: Bring your Letterboxd diary to Trakt! 🎬
import_guide_tvtime_description: Two ways to get your data out. Pick whichever suits you and import one export at a time:
import_guide_tvtime_step_1: Fastest: export your data with the TV Time Liberator extension while your TV Time log in still works, then upload the export .zip (or the activity_history.csv inside it) here
import_guide_tvtime_step_2: Official: request your GDPR data export on the TV Time privacy portal
import_guide_tvtime_step_3: Once the export is ready you'll get two emails: one with a .zip file and another with a password to unlock it.
import_guide_tvtime_step_4: Upload the unlocked .zip here. If the .zip is not accepted, extract it and upload the two tracking-prod-records .csv files (plus followed_tv_show.csv and ratings-live-votes.csv for your watchlist and ratings) instead.
import_guide_tvtime_title: Your TV Time isn't lost in space! 🚀
import_vip_limit_exceeded: Your import exceeds the free tier limit. Upgrade to VIP to import all {count} items.

notice_delete_account_vip: Since you're an active Trakt VIP, please cancel your VIP membership before deleting your account.
page_description_create_list: Enter a name and description for your list.
page_description_home: Track your shows and movies with Trakt Web — discover what's trending, get personalised recommendations, and never miss what's next.
page_description_media: Browse trending, popular, and highly anticipated movies and TV shows on Trakt Web. Find your next watch and keep track of everything you've seen.
page_description_movies: Browse trending, popular, and highly anticipated movies on Trakt Web. Find your next watch and keep track of everything you've seen.
page_description_releases: Upcoming movies and episodes from trending, recommended, or anticipated titles.
page_description_shows: Discover trending, popular, and highly anticipated TV shows on Trakt Web. Find your next binge-worthy series and track every episode.
preview_feature_description_edit_mode: Enable controls for hiding or showing configurable sections across the app.
preview_feature_description_month_in_rev: Preview Month in Review, now running directly in V3.
preview_feature_description_plex_sync: Connect Plex to sync your watch history, ratings, and library to Trakt. Includes connection, server selection, and sync tools.
preview_feature_description_rewatch: Start rewatching sessions for shows you've already seen, check in or mark watched episodes directly from the session drawer.
preview_feature_description_scoped_favor: Time-box favourite lists by showing current-year favourites on profiles and grouping the full favourites list by year.
preview_feature_description_smart_recomm: Use our next-gen engine to surface recommended movies and shows beyond the obvious.
preview_feature_description_smart_relate: Use our next-gen engine to surface related movies and shows beyond the obvious.
preview_feature_description_year_in_revi: Preview Year in Review, now running directly in V3.
text_about_tagline: Trakt automatically tracks what you're watching across all your devices and apps — giving you a single place to see your entire watch history, discover what's next, and connect with a community of millions of movie and TV lovers around the world.
text_billing_already_vip: You are now a Trakt VIP!\nThank you for your support and enjoy.
text_billing_disclaimer: Payment starts at end of trial period. Subscription auto-renews, and is billed each {period} until cancelled. Cancel any time via Google Play Subscription Centre.
text_billing_month_for_free: Try 1 month for free and then:
text_branding_alt_logos_desc: Use these logos when the default logos don't work well with your app's design.
text_branding_dark_background_desc: Use these logos in your app's dark theme.
text_branding_default_logos_desc: Use these Trakt logos to clearly identify your app is powered by Trakt. Please don't alter the logos or colours.
text_branding_questions_intro: Have questions about using our brand? Reach out.
text_branding_req_1: You may use the Trakt name and logo to refer to our service, in accordance with these guidelines.
text_branding_req_2: Do not alter, modify, rotate, or recolour the logo in any way.
text_branding_req_3: Do not use the logo as part of your own logo, brand name, or service.
text_branding_req_4: Maintain clear space around the logo equal to the height of the "T" in Trakt.
text_branding_req_5: Do not use the logo to imply sponsorship, endorsement, or affiliation with Trakt.
text_branding_req_6: Use only the approved logo versions provided here; do not recreate or modify them.

text_calendar_placeholder_9: No events this day. Maybe revisit an old favourite.

text_onboarding_3_description: Rate what you watch and join the conversation around movies and TV shows that are worth watching, or skipping.
text_onboarding_4_description_2: Join Trakt for free and discover more features waiting for you.

text_trakt_apps_description: and explore a more feature-rich Trakt experience on our native applications
text_vip_costs: VIP helps cover the real costs of running Trakt, including:
text_vip_costs_clients: Support for all first and third party Trakt clients
text_vip_costs_infrastructure: Custom API infrastructure for a massive global user base
text_vip_costs_team: The team that keeps it all running
text_vip_get_insights: Get deeper insights, smarter tracking, and early access to what's next.
text_vip_join_now: Join the society of viewers who treat every season and every premiere as a milestone. Elevate your status and gain the keys to a more sophisticated world of discovery.
text_vip_join_now_tagline: You've seen the surface, time to see the full picture.
text_vip_powers_trakt: helps power Trakt and unlocks features built for people who really care about what they watch.
text_vip_track_more: Track more, list more, rate more.

text_vip_upsell_preview_features: Upgrade to VIP to unlock preview features.
text_vip_upsell_sentiment: Upgrade to VIP to unlock more insights.

tooltip_stats_active_days: Days with at least one watch
tooltip_stats_avg_per_day: Average watch time on active days
tooltip_stats_best_day: Most watches in a single day
tooltip_stats_busiest_day: Day of week with the most watches
tooltip_stats_movies: Time spent watching movies this week
tooltip_stats_screen_time_share: % of waking hours spent watching (based on 16h day)
tooltip_stats_shows: Time spent watching shows this week
tooltip_text_preview_feature: This feature's still getting a fresh coat of paint, mate. We're hammering away at the UX, making it sing like a choir of angels (or at least, function smoothly without inducing existential dread).
translated_value_error_comment_invalid_c: Reviews must be at least 5 words.
translated_value_error_comment_unknown: An error occurred while posting your review. Please try again later.
translated_value_error_reply_invalid_con: Replies must be at least 5 words.
tv_time_banner_description: TV Time is shutting down on 15 July. Feel right at home with our familiar companion app, powered by your Trakt account.
tv_time_faq_dropped_shows_answer: Dropped status is not imported, so any shows you dropped there need to be dropped again on Trakt after importing.
tv_time_faq_dropped_shows_question: Do my dropped shows carry over?
tv_time_faq_missing_episodes_answer: As of 8 July 2026, we've improved how the importer matches episodes, so shows that previously came in incomplete should now import fully. Import your export again to pull in the missing episodes. If some are still missing after that, delete the old plays first, then import once more.
tv_time_faq_missing_episodes_question: Some shows or episodes are missing or marked unwatched.
tv_time_faq_missing_ratings_answer: Ratings live in ratings-live-votes.csv in the GDPR export, so make sure it's included. Episode ratings aren't supported, so only show and movie ratings are imported.
tv_time_faq_nothing_imported_answer: Usually the wrong files were uploaded, or the export was empty. Double-check you uploaded the files listed above from a fresh export. If it still comes up empty, send it to us below.
tv_time_faq_page_description: Common questions about moving your TV Time data to Trakt. Still stuck? Send us your export and we'll take a look.
tv_time_import_banner_description: We've upgraded the importer. If some shows or episodes are missing, import your TV Time export again to pull them in. Still missing after that? Delete the old plays first, then import once more.
tv_time_report_description: Attach your TV Time export and tell us what went wrong. Your files and Trakt account are sent privately to the team, never shared publicly.
tv_time_report_error_too_large: Those files are too large. Keep uploads under 25 MB in total.
tv_time_report_error_unknown: Something went wrong sending your report. Please try again.
tv_time_report_heading: Still stuck? Send us your export
tv_time_report_success: Thanks! Your report has been sent. We'll take a look.
tv_time_report_upload_prompt: Drop your TV Time export here, or click to choose files
validation_text_app_redirect_uris: Add at least one redirect URI.
validation_text_plex_home_users: Enter a comma-separated list of usernames, without spaces.
vip_feature_description_api_apps: Connect more third-party apps and services through the Trakt API to enhance your experience.
vip_feature_description_bigger_library: Store more of your viewing history with expanded library limits designed to last a lifetime.
vip_feature_description_bigger_watchlist: Expand your watchlist capacity to keep track of everything you want to watch without limits.
vip_feature_description_early_access: Get early access to new versions of Trakt apps and brand new features before anyone else.
vip_feature_description_global_wtw: See where shows and movies are available to stream anywhere in the world, not just your region.
vip_feature_description_increased_limits: Enjoy higher limits for your lists, ratings, and other features.
vip_feature_description_mir: Get a personalised overview of everything you watched and rated each month.
vip_feature_description_more_lists: Create even more custom lists to organise your shows and movies exactly the way you want.
vip_feature_description_more_to_come: We're constantly building new features exclusively for VIP members, with exciting updates already on the way.
vip_feature_description_plex_sync: Keep your Plex library perfectly synced with more frequent automatic updates throughout the day.
vip_feature_description_recaps: Get deeper insights with comprehensive month and year recaps showing everything you watched, rated, and discovered.
vip_feature_description_sentiment: Unlock more detailed sentiment analysis for shows and movies.
vip_feature_description_sentiment_trivia: Unlock detailed sentiment analysis and fascinating trivia about the movies and shows you watch.
vip_feature_description_streaming_servic: Connect and sync with additional streaming platforms to track your viewing across all services.
vip_feature_description_streaming_sync: Automatically sync your watched history and ratings from all your favourite streaming services.
vip_feature_description_support: Get priority access to our support forums and have your feedback heard directly by the team.
vip_feature_description_trivia: Get more trivia and insights about the movies and shows you watch.
vip_feature_description_vip_status: Show off your VIP status throughout the apps and website.
vip_feature_description_yir: Lots of stats for every year you've been a member.
warning_prompt_block_user_detail: They will no longer be able to follow you or see your activity.
warning_prompt_cancel_clear: Navigating away will stop clearing your data. Are you sure?
warning_prompt_cancel_import: Your import is in progress. Navigating away will stop it. Are you sure?
warning_prompt_cancel_vip: Are you sure you want to cancel your VIP subscription? You'll keep your VIP benefits until {date}, after which you'll lose access to VIP features. Trakt does not offer refunds for cancelled subscriptions.
warning_prompt_clean_up_history: This will permanently remove {count} duplicate plays, keeping only the most recent watch of each item. This cannot be undone.
warning_prompt_clear_data: Are you sure you want to clear your {source}? This cannot be undone.
warning_prompt_clear_watchlist: Are you sure you want to clear your entire watchlist? This cannot be undone.
warning_prompt_delete_account: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This will remove all of your data and cannot be undone.
warning_prompt_delete_comment: Are you sure you want to delete your review?
warning_prompt_delete_list: Are you sure you want to delete the list {name}?
warning_prompt_delete_note: Are you sure you want to delete this note?
warning_prompt_delete_reply: Are you sure you want to delete your reply?
warning_prompt_discard_changes: Are you sure you want to discard this? Any unsaved changes will be lost.
warning_prompt_drop_movie: Are you sure you want to drop "{title}"? This will remove it from your "Continue Watching" list.
warning_prompt_drop_show: Are you sure you want to drop "{title}"? This will remove it from your Continue Watching list.
warning_prompt_hide_recommendation: Are you sure you want to hide "{title}" from your recommendations?
warning_prompt_log_out: Are you sure you want to log out?
warning_prompt_mark_as_watched_multiple_: Are you sure you want to mark {count} episodes as watched?
warning_prompt_mark_as_watched_show: Are you sure you want to mark "{title}" as watched? This will mark all episodes as watched.
warning_prompt_mark_as_watched_show_andr: Are you sure you want to mark **all {count} episodes** of "{show}" as watched?
warning_prompt_mark_as_watched_show_unti: Are you sure you want to mark all unseen episodes of "{title}" as watched until episode {episode}? This will mark {count} episodes as watched.
warning_prompt_remove_from_favorites: Are you sure you want to remove "{title}" from your Favourites?
warning_prompt_remove_from_liked_lists: Are you sure you want to remove "{list}" from your liked lists?
warning_prompt_remove_from_personal_list: Are you sure you want to remove "{title}" from {list}?
warning_prompt_remove_from_watched: Are you sure you want to remove "{title}" from your Watched list? All plays will be removed.
warning_prompt_remove_from_watchlist: Are you sure you want to remove "{title}" from your Watchlist?
warning_prompt_remove_single_watched: Are you sure you want to remove this play of "{title}" from your Watched list?
warning_prompt_restore_show: Are you sure you want to restore "{title}" show? This will restore it on your progress and calendar.
warning_prompt_set_cover_image: Use "{title}" as your profile background image?
warning_prompt_simple_filters: Switching to simple filters will reset all your current filters. Are you sure you want to proceed?
warning_prompt_stop_checkin: Are you sure you want to stop watching "{title}"?
warning_prompt_suppress_ratings_toast: Do you want to stop being asked to rate what you recently watched?
warning_prompt_track_show_episode_count: Are you sure you want to mark "{title}" as watched? This will mark {count} episodes as watched.
warning_prompt_unfollow_user: Are you sure you want to unfollow {username}?
warning_prompt_younify_unlink: Are you sure you want to unlink {service}?
warning_smart_lists_limit: You've reached your smart list limit
welcome_banner_description: New to Trakt? Check out our welcome page. Already tracking on another service? Bring your watch history, watchlist, and ratings with you in just a couple of minutes.
welcome_import_description: Bring your watch history, watchlist, and ratings with you. Importing takes just a couple of minutes.
welcome_import_imdb_description: Import your ratings and watchlist from an IMDb export.
welcome_import_letterboxd_description: Bring your films, ratings, and watchlist over from Letterboxd.
welcome_intro: Your shows and movies, all in one place. Track what you watch, discover what's next, and pick up right where you left off; across every device you own.
welcome_tvtime_body: TV Time is closing its doors, but your watch history doesn't have to disappear with it. Bring everything over to Trakt and keep tracking without missing a beat.
welcome_tvtime_heading: Coming from TV Time? You're home.
welcome_tvtime_liberator_body: Export your full history with the TV Time Liberator browser extension, or upload the official GDPR data export from TV Time's privacy portal. Either one works.
yir_2024_stats_most_active_day: Your most active day was {date} with {count} plays.
yir_2024_stats_most_active_week: Your most active week was {start} - {end} with {count} plays.
yir_2024_stats_most_popular_time: The most popular time you watched was {time}.
yir_2024_thanks_copy_directed: You did an epic job directing {year}. Here's to an even better sequel in {nextYear}.
yir_2024_thanks_copy_recommend: Keep your journey going. Try watching one of these popular shows or movies.
yir_2024_trends_subtitle_movies: The most watched movies that premiered in {year}.
yir_2024_trends_subtitle_shows: The most watched shows that premiered in {year}.
yir_label_plays_by_day: {type} plays by day of the week
yir_share_text: Check out my {year} Year in Review on Trakt
yir_share_text_all_time: Check out my all-time stats on Trakt
yir_top_card_description: The most-watched {type} by the Trakt community of all time. The ones you've watched are highlighted.
yir_top_card_description_movies: The top movies watched by the Trakt community for all time. Movies that you watched in {start} ">" {end} are highlighted.
yir_top_card_description_shows: The top shows watched by the Trakt community for all time. Shows that you watched in {start} ">" {end} are highlighted.
yir_upgrade_message: Upgrade to VIP and get your own all time and yearly Year in Review pages, plus a lot more great features!
